name: Italian Garden Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, melt the butter.
2. Add zucchini, corn, pepper, onion, and seasonings to the skillet.
3. Saute over medium heat, stirring frequently, until vegetables are tender and excess liquid has evaporated (8 to 10 minutes).
4. Gently stir in tomatoes; continue cooking just until hot, yet firm (2 to 3 minutes).
